verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They sent for Jesus, your friend's about to die But tarried He still on behind So they laid Lazarus in the tomb And they said their last good-byes Then coming down the road was Jesus Right on time.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just hold on my child Because He's not too far away And He knows your needs before you pray So when your feet are weary From those mountains you have climbed Look ahead, here comes Jesus Right on time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've struggled through life's deserts They were so hot and dry Till it seemed all hope was gone And I would die And I wondered where was He Is He still a friend of mine Then coming down the road was Jesus Right on time
